defs: One of two circular stones used for grinding grain or other substance in a mill{1}.
quotes: No man shall take the nether or the upper millstone to pledge.
notes: ☞ The cellular siliceous rock called buhrstone is usually employed for millstones; also, some kinds of lava, as that Niedermendig, or other firm rock with rough texture. The surface of a millstone has usually a series of radial grooves in which the powdered material collects.
